generated_from.method: Extracted from the official EPHS clubs page (eagles.edenpr.org/clubs), including every high-school club link. Club names and per-club official page URLs are authoritative. Descriptions are concise plain-language summaries (descriptionSource='general'); advisor, meeting time, and room are 'Not listed' because the clubs index does not publish them (advisors submit them separately each year). Categories and typical Tuesday EP-Focus meeting days are best-effort and admin-editable.
generated_from.note: Student-led clubs typically meet during 'EP Focus time' on Tuesdays; join by adding yourself to the club's Schoology group. New/returning clubs apply annually (2026-2027 window: June 2 - September 8, 2026).

clubs.name: Aerospace Team
clubs.description: Students explore aerospace, rocketry, and flight through hands-on projects and competition.
clubs.joinInstructions: Student-led clubs: join by adding yourself to the club's Schoology group. A staff advisor is required and clubs re-charter each year. Confirm the current advisor, meeting day/time, and room on the club's Schoology page or with the EPHS Student Activities Office.
clubs.additionalNotes: Official EPHS club. Advisor, meeting day/time, and room are set each year and are not published on the clubs index; see the official club page or the Activities Office.

clubs.joinInstructions: Student-led clubs: join by adding yourself to the club's Schoology group. A staff advisor is required and clubs re-charter each year. Confirm the current advisor, meeting day/time, and room on the club's Schoology page or with the EPHS Student Activities Office.
clubs.additionalNotes: Official EPHS club. Advisor, meeting day/time, and room are set each year and are not published on the clubs index; see the official club page or the Activities Office.
